raw_consumer_statement: XXXX'I am filing a complaint regarding Citibanks improper handling of a disputed XXXX credit card charge posted on XXXX XXXX XXXX I purchased service from a travel agent operating as Reservation Desk, who told me they were a special agency of XXXX  assigned to handle my ticketing issue and billed my account under XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The agent confirmed in writing that I was owed a full refund, but they never issued it, never provided the replacement ticket, and no service was ever delivered. I notified Citi of the dispute within the FCBA XXXX  day window and submitted the written refund confirmation, but Citi ignored this evidence and did not review or request any of the documentation showing the merchant agreed to refund the charge.XXXXCiti denied the billing dispute by claiming the merchant names did not match, and denied the fraud claim by claiming the charge was authorized. During a call with Citis XXXX  Response Team, I was told Citi attempted to call only the phone number in the billing descriptor, received no answer, and made no further attempt to contact the merchant using the accurate contact information I provided, including the toll free number I used to request the refund XXXX XXXX XXXX and the representatives name, XXXX. Citi also ignored the merchants email address, which appears in Citis own denial letters (Exhibits XXXX XXXX  and XXXX). Citi provided no documentation of any investigation steps and has not provided any voice recordings, even though those recordings would show that my statements were taken out of context and that I repeatedly asked Citi to research and resolve the case. Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, Citis conclusions cannot both be true: if the merchant names do not match, the charge is unauthorized; if they do match, this is a clear billing error because the merchant confirmed a refund in writing and no service was provided. Citis investigation was incomplete, contradictory, and failed to meet FCBA requirements. I am requesting a full reimbursement of XXXX and disclosure of all internal notes, merchant contact attempts, and all voice recordings associated with Citi Case XXXX
